name: Crab Casserole in a Clay Pot
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds Fresh whole crab, preferably live
2 Unpeeled fresh ginger, sliced, 1/4 inch thick
2 Fresh red chili peppers, seeded and shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. If using a live crab, prepare it by rinsing, scrubbing, and steaming for ten minutes.
2. Cut the body into quarters and lightly crack the claws and legs.
3. Heat a wok or large skillet until hot, then add the peanut oil.
4. Add garlic, ginger, and scallions; stir-fry to flavor the oil.
5. Add black beans, chili peppers, and crab; stir-fry for 2 minutes.
6. Pour in chicken stock; turn contents into a clay pot or casserole dish.
7. Cover and cook over high heat for 5 more minutes, or until the crab shell turns bright red.
8. Serve immediately.
Makes 4 servings.
